mapper.select: /** UsptLastSlctnProcessHistDao.selectList */ select fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSPD_CODE_GROUP}', ulsph.last_slctn_process_div_cd) as last_slctn_process_div , ulsph.resn_cn , ci.member_nm , ci.login_id , ulsph.created_dt , row_number() over (order by ulsph.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_last_slctn_process_hist ulsph inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ulsph.creator_id where evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}
